mapper.select:
SELECT S1.VNENTRLON_ID , S1.RCMD_ENPR_BZN , S1.UTLINSTT_ID , (SELECT A.ETNM FROM IVBADM.TB_BOX_IVT_ENPR_INFO_M A WHERE A.UTLINSTT_ID = S1.UTLINSTT_ID) AS INVM_ENPR_NM , S1.ETNM , S1.RGSN_TS , S1.RECOMEND_STTUS , (SELECT COM_CD_NM FROM IVBADM.TB_BOX_IVT_COM_CD_D WHERE (GRP_CD_ID = 'RST01' OR GRP_CD_ID = 'RST02') AND COM_CD_ID = S1.RECOMEND_STTUS) AS RECOMEND_STTUS_NM FROM TB_BOX_IVT_VNENTRLON_REQST_BASS_M S1
WHERE 1=1
AND ( UPPER(S1.ETNM) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{searchComNm}) || '%' )
AND UPPER(S1.RCMD_ENPR_BZN) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{searchRcmdEnrpBzn}) || '%'
AND S1.RECOMEND_STTUS = #{searchRecomendSttus}
ORDER BY S1.RGSN_TS DESC

SELECT S1.INVT_ID , S1.ATCH_DSNC , S1.BSDS_CD , S2.FILE_ID , S2.FILE_NM , S1.RGSN_USER_ID , S1.RGSN_TS FROM TB_BOX_IVT_IDIV_ATCH_R S1 LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_FILE_ATCH_M S2 ON S1.FILE_ID = S2.FILE_ID WHERE S1.INVT_ID = #{invtId} AND S1.ATCH_DSNC = #{atchDsnc} AND S1.BSDS_CD = #{bsdsCd}

SELECT S1.VNENTRLON_ID /*식별번호*/ , S1.BZN /*사업자번호*/ , S1.UTLINSTT_ID /*이용기관 ID*/ , S1.ETNM /*기업명*/ , S1.RGSN_TS /*등록일*/ , S1.RECOMEND_STTUS_CM /*추천상태*/ , S1.RSPR_NM /*기업 담당자명*/ , S1.RSPR_CNPL_TPN /*담당자 연락처*/ , (SELECT COM_CD_NM FROM IVBADM.TB_BOX_IVT_COM_CD_D WHERE GRP_CD_ID = 'RST02' AND COM_CD_ID = S1.RECOMEND_STTUS_CM) AS RECOMEND_STTUS_CM_NM /*추천상태명*/ , (SELECT A.ETNM FROM IVBADM.TB_BOX_IVT_ENPR_INFO_M A WHERE A.UTLINSTT_ID = S1.UTLINSTT_ID) AS INVM_ENPR_NM /* 추천투자기관명 */ FROM TB_BOX_IVT_VNENT_RLON_APLC_RGSN_M S1 WHERE 1=1
AND ( UPPER(S1.ETNM) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{searchComNm}) || '%' )
AND UPPER(S1.BZN) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{searchRcmdEnrpBzn}) || '%'
AND S1.RECOMEND_STTUS_CM = #{searchRecomendSttus}
ORDER BY S1.RGSN_TS DESC
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_BOX_IVT_AGREM_VNENTR_INVT_MANAGE_M WHERE 1=1 AND BZN = #{bzn}
SELECT ENPR_INFO FROM TB_BOX_IVT_ENPR_INFO_M WHERE 1=1 AND BZN = #{bzn}

SELECT AGREM_VNENTR_SEQ , INVM_ENPR_NM , BZN , ADR , AGREM_YN , AGREM_CNCLSDE , AGREM_EXPRTNDE , AGRMNT_ATCHMNFL , CONTACT_RSPR_ONE_NM , CONTACT_RSPR_ONE_CNPL_TPN , CONTACT_RSPR_ONE_EAD , CONTACT_RSPR_TWO_NM , CONTACT_RSPR_TWO_CNPL_TPN , CONTACT_RSPR_TWO_EAD , RGSN_TS , RGSN_USER_ID , AMNN_TS , AMNN_USER_ID FROM TB_BOX_IVT_AGREM_VNENTR_INVT_MANAGE_M WHERE 1 = 1
AND ( UPPER(INVM_ENPR_NM) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{searchComNm}) || '%' )
AND UPPER(BZN) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{searchRcmdEnrpBzn}) || '%'
ORDER BY RGSN_TS DESC

SELECT AGREM_VNENTR_SEQ , INVM_ENPR_NM , BZN , ADR , AGREM_YN , AGREM_CNCLSDE , AGREM_EXPRTNDE , AGRMNT_ATCHMNFL , CONTACT_RSPR_ONE_NM , CONTACT_RSPR_ONE_CNPL_TPN , CONTACT_RSPR_ONE_EAD , CONTACT_RSPR_TWO_NM , CONTACT_RSPR_TWO_CNPL_TPN , CONTACT_RSPR_TWO_EAD , RGSN_TS , RGSN_USER_ID , AMNN_TS , AMNN_USER_ID FROM TB_BOX_IVT_AGREM_VNENTR_INVT_MANAGE_M WHERE 1=1 AND AGREM_VNENTR_SEQ = #{agremVnentrSeq}

SELECT AGREM_VNENTR_SEQ , INVM_ENPR_NM , BZN , ADR , AGREM_YN , AGREM_CNCLSDE , AGREM_EXPRTNDE , AGRMNT_ATCHMNFL , CONTACT_RSPR_ONE_NM , CONTACT_RSPR_ONE_CNPL_TPN , CONTACT_RSPR_ONE_EAD , CONTACT_RSPR_TWO_NM , CONTACT_RSPR_TWO_CNPL_TPN , CONTACT_RSPR_TWO_EAD , RGSN_TS , RGSN_USER_ID , AMNN_TS , AMNN_USER_ID FROM TB_BOX_IVT_AGREM_VNENTR_INVT_MANAGE_M WHERE 1=1 AND BZN = #{bzn}

SELECT AGREM_VNENTR_SEQ , INVM_ENPR_NM , BZN , ADR , AGREM_YN , AGREM_CNCLSDE , AGREM_EXPRTNDE , AGRMNT_ATCHMNFL , CONTACT_RSPR_ONE_NM , CONTACT_RSPR_ONE_CNPL_TPN , CONTACT_RSPR_ONE_EAD , CONTACT_RSPR_TWO_NM , CONTACT_RSPR_TWO_CNPL_TPN , CONTACT_RSPR_TWO_EAD , RGSN_TS , RGSN_USER_ID , AMNN_TS , AMNN_USER_ID FROM TB_BOX_IVT_AGREM_VNENTR_INVT_MANAGE_M WHERE 1 = 1 ORDER BY RGSN_TS DESC

SELECT S1.VNENTRLON_ID , S1.RCMD_ENPR_BZN , S1.UTLINSTT_ID , (SELECT A.ETNM FROM IVBADM.TB_BOX_IVT_ENPR_INFO_M A WHERE A.UTLINSTT_ID = S1.UTLINSTT_ID) AS INVM_ENPR_NM , S1.ETNM , S1.RGSN_TS , S1.RECOMEND_STTUS , (SELECT COM_CD_NM FROM IVBADM.TB_BOX_IVT_COM_CD_D WHERE (GRP_CD_ID = 'RST01' OR GRP_CD_ID = 'RST02') AND COM_CD_ID = S1.RECOMEND_STTUS) AS RECOMEND_STTUS_NM FROM TB_BOX_IVT_VNENTRLON_REQST_BASS_M S1 WHERE 1=1 ORDER BY S1.RGSN_TS DESC

SELECT S1.VNENTRLON_ID /*식별번호*/ , S1.BZN /*사업자번호*/ , S1.UTLINSTT_ID /*이용기관 ID*/ , S1.ETNM /*기업명*/ , S1.RGSN_TS /*등록일*/ , S1.RECOMEND_STTUS_CM /*추천상태*/ , S1.RSPR_NM /*기업 담당자명*/ , S1.RSPR_CNPL_TPN /*담당자 연락처*/ , (SELECT COM_CD_NM FROM IVBADM.TB_BOX_IVT_COM_CD_D WHERE GRP_CD_ID = 'RST02' AND COM_CD_ID = S1.RECOMEND_STTUS_CM) AS RECOMEND_STTUS_CM_NM /*추천상태명*/ , (SELECT A.ETNM FROM IVBADM.TB_BOX_IVT_ENPR_INFO_M A WHERE A.UTLINSTT_ID = S1.UTLINSTT_ID) AS INVM_ENPR_NM /* 추천투자기관명 */ FROM TB_BOX_IVT_VNENT_RLON_APLC_RGSN_M S1 WHERE 1=1 ORDER BY S1.RGSN_TS DESC;
